# 98.js assets

Visual assets, system sounds, and UI patterns adapted from [98.js](https://98.js.org/) ([1j01/98](https://github.com/1j01/98)), used with permission from the project author.

Included:
- `audio/` — Windows system sounds
- `images/icons/` — Win9x-style application icons
- `images/browse-ui-icons*.png` — Explorer toolbar sprites

Adapted code:
- `vendor98.js` — icon paths, system sounds (from `src/helpers.js`, `programs/explorer/explorer.js`)
- `explorer-toolbar.css` — toolbar styling (from `programs/explorer/explorer.css`)
